name: Feature request

title: "[feature] "

---

## Workflow

What small-biz, agency, solo consultant, or local-first workflow would this
improve?

## Current Workaround

How do you handle this today?

## Proposed Behavior

What should Plain Factory do?

## Why It Belongs Here

We prioritize features that help small biz / agencies / solo consultants. We do
not currently scope enterprise compliance or SOC2 features.

## Example

If possible, include a tiny brief, profile snippet, or artifact shape.
